riskFloorReasons: migration / fleet-rollout surface: src/core/PostUpdateMigrator.ts touches PostUpdateMigrator (fleet migration machinery)
new capability: new config key added

causalAutopsy.notes: The MessageSentinel emergency-stop handler set a GLOBAL resume-queue pause with no expiry/re-arm — a latent over-broad side-effect in the original reap-notify/midwork-resume-queue design (reap-notify-per-topic-and-midwork-resume-queue.md). It surfaced on 2026-06-14 when a stale emergency stop stranded a later, unrelated age-limit active-run revival for ~4h. Fixed by auto-resuming a provably-stale emergency pause while the finer-grained per-topic operatorStopSince guard keeps a genuinely-stopped topic blocked.
